title: Metric
description: Represents quantification metadata used to strengthen achievements and bullets with measurable results.

metric_type.description: Type of metric (e.g., cost savings, time reduction, revenue increase, efficiency gain).

before_value.description: Value before the improvement or action.

after_value.description: Value after the improvement or action.

delta.description: Difference between before and after values.

timeframe.description: Time period over which the change occurred.

confidence_level.description: Confidence in the accuracy of the metric.

related_achievement_id.description: Optional link to the achievement this metric supports.

related_bullet_id.description: Optional link to the bullet this metric supports.
